summary: Integration tests successfully validated all VibeTeacher integrations work end-to-end. All 4 test scenarios passed: finalize activates teaching, SMS contains teaching summary, learnings harvest works correctly, and teaching commands function properly.
learnings: All VibeTeacher integrations are functioning correctly. The finalize process properly activates teaching, captures teaching moments, and includes teaching summaries in SMS notifications. No regressions detected in existing finalize flow.
